customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety. Juan is self-sold on solar and his home's suitability. His stall is interpersonal — he hasn't convinced his wife — not skepticism or financial doubt. Expect low resistance from Juan; wife's posture is unknown.
unresolved_concerns: Wife has not been engaged and has not agreed to the appointment — Juan says 'I ain't convinced her yet.' The closer must confirm wife will be present before starting the proposal.

Iron Solar (likely a competitor) has already visited the home and provided a site assessment. Juan may be comparing proposals. Closer should clarify whether 'Iron Solar' is a competitor or a mispronunciation of ION, and whether a prior ION visit occurred.
No bill data captured. Closer has no utility company, average monthly spend, or roof age. These must be gathered before or at the start of the proposal.
